title: Ramp Prep
summary: Practical Ramp-style drills focused on API traversal, temporal state, ledgers, sliding windows, dependency graphs, and progressive in-memory systems.

CRUD, priority sorting, quotas, assignments, overdue state
spreadsheet cells, formula parsing, lazy recalculation, cycle detection
in-memory reservations, interval availability, deterministic room assignment
